test_command: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/specialists/EvolutionAgent.test.ts tests/integration/api/evolution-threshold.test.ts && pnpm vitest run --config vitest.judge.config.ts tests/judge/evolution-agent.judge.ts && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint
notes: 零回归: 757 tests / 0 failures. US-003 专用: 13 tests (unit=10, integration=3) / 0 failures. Judge: 2 tests / 0 failures. Typecheck: 0 errors. Lint: 0 warnings. AC-8 hook 位于 evolution.evolve (而非 costLog.logFeedback) — 语义正确: feedbackLog.create 后异步调 enqueueIfThresholdMet 不阻塞 mutation. costLog.logFeedback 写 cost_log 不是 feedback_log, 前次 SUSPECTED 确认为 PRD AC 措辞偏差而非实现错误.
